Metadata.title: Lại Ngọc Lâm — Full-Stack Developer
Metadata.description: Full-stack engineer from Hanoi shipping products to tens of thousands of merchants. Shopify apps, data platforms, and the occasional orbital maneuver.

Hero.titleRich: Building software at the speed of light, grounded on Earth.
Hero.subRich: Full-stack engineer — 3 years shipping products that serve 50,000+ merchants, plus 6 months leading a 5-person crew across Shopify apps, data platforms, and the occasional orbital maneuver.
Hero.tickerItem2: bulk image optimization at million-object scale

About.headingRich: A generalist who actually likes both halves of the stack.
About.para1: I'm Lâm — a full-stack engineer based in Hanoi. For the last three years I've been building web products that ship to tens of thousands of people, and for the last six months I've also been leading the team that builds them.
About.para2: My favorite kind of work is the unglamorous infrastructure that makes a product feel fast: image pipelines that chew through millions of objects, data platforms that stitch 21 apps into one view, dashboards that turn raw events into decisions.

m3.title: Avada Group
m3.lede: Leading a 5-person crew (2 dev · 1 QA · 1 BA) on Shopify apps that collectively serve tens of thousands of merchants.
m3.bullet1Rich: Avada SEO Suite (~50k merchants) — built a bulk image optimization pipeline that scales to millions of product images per merchant.
m3.bullet2Rich: AP Speed Optimizer — led from zero to 5,000+ active merchants, averaging ~500 new merchants / month for six consecutive months.
m3.bullet3Rich: Data Analytics Platform — ingested 21 Shopify apps into BigQuery, modeling revenue, margin, LTV, churn and high-potential-customer signals.

m2.title: VNPT Technology
m2.bullet1Rich: iOffice — extended a government document-management platform powering inter-department and cross-provincial workflows nationwide.
m2.bullet2Rich: Automation Management System — built an internal tool automating VNPT Net's network device operations.

m1.title: FPT University
m1.bodyRich: Graduated with "Good" classification, Dec 2024 · GPA 8.024/10. Graduation project (RecruitMe) recognized as outstanding and featured in FPT's official news and Facebook channels.

recruitme.title: RecruitMe
recruitme.desc: AI-powered recruitment platform — OCR CV parsing (AWS Textract) and generative-AI scoring (Gemini). Graduation thesis recognized as outstanding and featured in FPT University's official news + Facebook channels.
recruitme.previewFooter: Upload ▸ Textract OCR ▸ Gemini score ▸ Shortlist

seo.title: Avada SEO Suite
seo.desc: Built the image-optimization pipeline — one slice of a broader SEO suite serving ~50k Shopify stores, some with hundreds of thousands to millions of product images each.
seo.metricLabel: stores served · up to millions of images each

speed.title: AP Speed Optimizer
speed.desc: Zero → 5,000+ merchants in six months. Led product + crew.

data.title: Avada Data Platform
data.desc: 21 Shopify apps → BigQuery. Revenue, LTV, churn, signals.

Contact.headingRich:
Got a mission?

Let's find its launch window.
Contact.body: I'm open to full-time full-stack roles, tech-lead tracks, and interesting contract work — especially anything involving real scale, real data, or real users.
Contact.address: Nghĩa Đô, Cầu Giấy, Hà Nội
Contact.builtWith: Built with Next.js, a lot of CSS, and a small amount of gravity.
